name: Avent Park
description: Come play pickleball at Avent Park in Oxford, MS! There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Coach Howell Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Coach Howell Activity Center in Oxford, MS! There are 6 indoor wood and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, food, and water.
open_play_schedule: Beginners usually on left side of curtain.

name: Goose Creek Club
description: Come play pickleball at Goose Creek Club in Oxford, MS! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
